commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a bundled AICS/Dijie extension, Dijie execution-token protocol schemas, AICS Control UI routes/chat mode, role-builder execution/audit tooling, docs, and focused tests.

PR surface: Source +4473, Tests +2497, Docs +813, Other +20. Total +7803 across 43 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. This PR adds a new AICS/Dijie bridge rather than reporting a current-main bug. The review path is source and proof inspection of the proposed feature surface.
